care.summary: A popular, easy-to-grow houseplant known for its umbrella-like leaf clusters.
care.light: Bright, indirect light. Can tolerate some lower light but will become leggy.
care.water: Water thoroughly when the top 2 inches of soil are dry. Do not overwater.
care.fertilizer: Diluted liquid fertilizer once a month during spring and summer.
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic to cats and dogs if ingested.
common_issues: Leaf drop from overwatering or cold drafts
tips: Prune regularly to keep it bushy and prevent legginess.
Rotate the pot frequently for even growth.
